calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa appeared by zoom for Anita Wharton (Proposed Administrator).

The Court stated that the only issue is what the appropriate amount of bond would be. Mr. Siracusa stated that the amount of the unsecured debt is $11,000.00, that the minimum amount of bond they could obtain is $20,000.00 and that his recommendation is that a $20,000.00 bond would suffice. Mr. Siracusa also stated that if they have waivers, they are only required to bond for the unsecured debt, that his Client is very responsible, that the intent is to sell the property and that right now his Client has been paying on the property to keep it out of foreclosure. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Bond will be set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for April 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
